stack.title: Intake
stack.body: A claw with three axis of freedom

stack.title: Gearbox
stack.body: We could rotate around our heaver slides using a Gearbox with lots of torque

stack.title: Viper Slides
stack.body: 4 times extention with long viperslides that could rotate.

stats.label: Chassiss
stats.value: Custom Machined Aluminum Chassiss with three gobilda opdometry pods, and gobilda macanum wheels

stats.label: Auto
stats.value: 3 Specimens or 1 sample, an experimental 2 sample auto that use the camera, was difficult due to the lack of intake

stats.label: Scoring
stats.value: about 95 points solo, we had the ability to do either specimins or samples providing maximum flexibility with our partner

stats.label: Endgame
stats.value: Level 1 hang early in the season

timeline.title: Kickoff
timeline.detail: Brainstorming game strategy and initial designs

timeline.title: Screamage
timeline.detail: Parts came in late so we only had a chassis

timeline.title: Meet #3
timeline.detail: slides broke on bucket causing our infamous sample launch

timeline.title: League Tournament
timeline.detail: We got 5th in quals and for playoffs we got third

timeline.title: Self-hosted scrimmage
timeline.detail: We hosted a scrimmage with a few teams that did not move on from Leagues
